description: Alpic is a cloud platform for building, deploying, monitoring, and distributing MCP servers and ChatGPT-style AI apps. It provides hosted MCP endpoints, testing/playground tooling, analytics, and deployment workflows for agent-accessible services.
summary: Alpic exposes a REST API at `https://api.alpic.ai/v1` with an OpenAPI spec, plus an npm-distributed `alpic` CLI; both support Alpic-issued bearer credentials, and the CLI also supports browser-based login.
